exceptions.reason: No role="feed" -- the list renders as a plain <ul> with no role added.
No role="article" on any row -- each <li> is a plain list item, or whatever `renderItem` returns when the caller supplies it.
No aria-labelledby or aria-label anywhere -- the <ul> carries none, and nothing else in the file does either.
No aria-posinset or aria-setsize on any row -- a row's position within the feed is not exposed to assistive tech at all.
No aria-busy anywhere. There is no concept of a pending update in this component; it just re-renders from the `items` prop with no busy signal during that swap.
No onKeyDown handler exists anywhere in the file; PageDown does nothing.
Same as PageDown -- no keyboard handling exists at all.
